title: A Tiny Gem in the Jungle of Myanmar

scenes.text: Discover a serene lake known for its floating gardens and unique culture.
This is Inle Lake, located in Shan State, Myanmar.
Inle Lake is famous for its traditional fishermen who row with one leg.
Explore the beautiful floating gardens cultivated by local families.
scenes.label: FLOATING GARDENS

scenes.text: Follow for a new corner of Earth every day.

description: 📍 Inle Lake, Shan State - Myanmar. A tranquil lake renowned for its unique fishing techniques and vibrant floating gardens. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌍
